title: Warm Brazilian Coconut Casserole
description: A delicious, comforting casserole that combines the flavors of Brazil with the warmth of coconut. Perfect for a cozy evening.
instructions: Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with olive oil.
In a large skillet, sauté the onions and garlic until softened.
Add the sliced sweet potatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix together the coconut milk and Brazilian cheese.
Add the cooked sweet potato mixture to the coconut milk mixture and stir to combine.
Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the casserole is golden brown and set.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
